mapper.select: SELECT P.ID, P.PAY_NO, P.SRC_NO, P.VD_CD, P.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(P.PAY_DUE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_DUE_YMD, P.PAY_AMT, P.PAY_METHOD_CD, M.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_METHOD_NM, TO_CHAR(P.PAY_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_YMD, P.PAY_STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_STS_NM, P.REG_ID FROM PY_PAYMENT P LEFT JOIN CM_CODE M ON M.GRP_CD='PAY_METHOD' AND M.CD=P.PAY_METHOD_CD AND M.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='PY_STS' AND S.CD=P.PAY_STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE P.DEL_YN='N' AND (P.PAY_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR P.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR P.SRC_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') AND P.PAY_STS=#{paySts} ORDER BY P.ID DESC

SELECT P.ID, P.COMP_CD, P.PAY_NO, P.SRC_TYP, P.SRC_ID, P.SRC_NO, P.VD_CD, P.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(P.PAY_DUE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_DUE_YMD, P.PAY_AMT, P.PAY_METHOD_CD, M.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_METHOD_NM, P.BANK_CD, P.BANK_NM, P.ACCT_NO, P.ACCT_HOLDER, P.NOTE_NO, TO_CHAR(P.NOTE_DUE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS NOTE_DUE_YMD, TO_CHAR(P.PAY_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_YMD, P.PAY_STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_STS_NM, P.REMARK, P.REG_ID FROM PY_PAYMENT P LEFT JOIN CM_CODE M ON M.GRP_CD='PAY_METHOD' AND M.CD=P.PAY_METHOD_CD AND M.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='PY_STS' AND S.CD=P.PAY_STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE P.ID=#{id} AND P.DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PY_PAYMENT (COMP_CD, PAY_NO, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, SRC_NO, VD_CD, VD_NM, PAY_DUE_YMD, PAY_AMT, PAY_METHOD_CD, BANK_CD, BANK_NM, ACCT_NO, ACCT_HOLDER, PAY_STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{payNo}, #{srcTyp}, #{srcId}, #{srcNo}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, TO_DATE(#{payDueYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{payAmt},0), #{payMethodCd}, #{bankCd}, #{bankNm}, #{acctNo}, #{acctHolder}, 'PLAN', #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE PY_PAYMENT SET PAY_STS=#{paySts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PY_PAYMENT WHERE SRC_TYP=#{srcTyp} AND SRC_ID=#{srcId} AND DEL_YN='N' AND PAY_STS<>'CANCEL'
